Installation
============

Install from Source
-------------------

.. code-block:: bash

   git clone https://github.com/Lenny987/Cases/tree/SimpleGA
   cd simplega
   pip install -e .


Dependencies
------------

* Python 3.7+
* NumPy >= 1.21.0
* Matplotlib >= 3.5.0
* SciPy >= 1.7.0 (optional, for advanced features)


Development Dependencies
------------------------

For development and documentation:

.. code-block:: bash

   pip install pytest sphinx sphinx-rtd-theme jupyter
